title: filter_presence: OwnerPresence::Unknown sends literal "unknown" to server
description: ChatContactQueryInput.filter_presence is now Option<OwnerPresence>. If a caller passes Some(OwnerPresence::Unknown) (a round-tripped unrecognized value), serde serializes it as the literal string "unknown" (documented serde(other) limitation). The server will receive an unrecognized presence filter value and may return an error or an empty result. There is no guard against this at the call site. Mitigation: either document the footgun explicitly on the field, or return ClientError::InvalidInput if filter_presence is Unknown.
close_reason: Fixed: guard added in contact.rs returning InvalidArgument if filter_presence is OwnerPresence::Unknown
